name: Chania
description: Chania sits on the northwest coast of Crete, a harbour town built around a Venetian old town and working port. The facts below are screened, sourced, and dated for anyone weighing a move there. They are not advice.

priceLevelIndexEU27.sourceName: Eurostat, price level index for actual individual consumption (tec00120, EU27=100)
priceLevelIndexEU27.excerpt: Greece price level index for actual individual consumption (EU27 = 100): 87.4 in 2025 (100 = EU average).

averageJanuaryHighC.sourceName: Hellenic National Meteorological Service climate atlas, Chania (Souda) 1971 to 2000, via Wikipedia
averageJanuaryHighC.excerpt: Chania (Souda airport), 1971 to 2000 normals: mean daily maximum 14.0 C in January.

averageJulyHighC.sourceName: Hellenic National Meteorological Service climate atlas, Chania (Souda) 1971 to 2000, via Wikipedia
averageJulyHighC.excerpt: Chania (Souda airport), 1971 to 2000 normals: mean daily maximum 30.5 C in July, the hottest month.

averageAnnualSunHours.sourceName: Hellenic National Meteorological Service climate atlas, Chania (Souda) 1971 to 2000, via Wikipedia
averageAnnualSunHours.excerpt: Mean annual sunshine 2,813.7 hours (Chania Souda, 1971 to 2000 normals).

koppenClass.sourceName: GloH2O Koppen-Geiger climate classification (Beck et al. 2023)
koppenClass.excerpt: Koppen-Geiger class Csa, hot-summer Mediterranean, the dominant class for coastal Crete.

digitalNomadVisa.sourceName: Hellenic Ministry of Migration and Asylum, digital nomad residence permit (Migration Code, Law 5038/2023)
digitalNomadVisa.excerpt: Digital nomad residence permit: minimum net monthly income 3,500 euros, plus 20 percent for a spouse and 15 percent per child. National entry visa valid 12 months, convertible to a 2 year renewable permit.

headlinePersonalIncomeTaxRate.sourceName: PwC Worldwide Tax Summaries, Greece, taxes on personal income
headlinePersonalIncomeTaxRate.excerpt: Top marginal personal income tax rate of 44 percent on income above 60,000 euros (general scale 9, 20, 26, 34, 39, 44 percent).

nearest_airport.excerpt: LGSA, large_airport, Chania International Airport, municipality Souda, IATA CHQ.

airport_drive_minutes.value: OSRM route proxy from Chania town point to Chania International Airport (CHQ/LGSA): 24.4 minutes, 15.7 km.
airport_drive_minutes.sourceName: OSRM public routing table over OpenStreetMap-derived road graph, Chania point to Crete airport points
airport_drive_minutes.excerpt: OSRM table returned Chania to CHQ 24.4 minutes and 15.7 km; HER was 155.3 minutes and JSH was 279.4 minutes.

airport_summer_direct_destinations.sourceName: Chania Airport / Fraport Greece destinations timetable
airport_summer_direct_destinations.excerpt: Official Chania Airport endpoints returned 116 listed destination airports. The /en/destinations endpoint with ArrivalStatus=D returned outbound timetable rows for 115 airports, with IST listed but no outbound rows. The page says the flight information relates to the period up to 24/10/2026; the HSCA March 2026 calendar identifies NS26 starting 29-Mar-26 and NW26/27 starting 25-Oct-26.

bus_frequency_proxy.value: 22 daily outbound spine departures from Chania, counting 18 Chania-Rethymno-Heraklion services plus 4 express Chania-Heraklion services. Selected corridor: Chania to Rethymno and Heraklion intercity spine.
bus_frequency_proxy.sourceName: KTEL Chania-Rethymno Chania departures PDF valid from 27 June 2026
bus_frequency_proxy.excerpt: The KTEL Chania-Rethymno PDF 'Bus departures from Chania' is valid from 27 June 2026. It lists 18 daily Chania-Georgioupolis-Kavros-Rethymno-Bali-Heraklion departures and 4 daily express Chania-Heraklion departures.

blue_flag_beaches.sourceName: Blue Flag Greece, 2026 awarded beaches list
blue_flag_beaches.excerpt: English official awards list has CHANIA R.U. > Chania Municipality: 15 awarded beaches, including Ag. Apostoli 1, Ag. Apostoli 2, Agia Marina/Santa Marina, Ag. Marina/The noverian Antama organic beach resort.

temp_monthly_high.value: Jan 13.2C; Feb 13.4C; Mar 15.1C; Apr 17.7C; May 21.5C; Jun 25.6C; Jul 27.9C; Aug 28C; Sep 25.5C; Oct 22C; Nov 18.2C; Dec 14.7C
temp_monthly_high.sourceName: Open-Meteo Historical Weather API, 1991-2020 daily archive point sample for Chania
temp_monthly_high.excerpt: Chania 1991-2020 monthly average daily high temperatures from Open-Meteo daily temperature_2m_max: Jan 13.2C; Feb 13.4C; Mar 15.1C; Apr 17.7C; May 21.5C; Jun 25.6C; Jul 27.9C; Aug 28C; Sep 25.5C; Oct 22C; Nov 18.2C; Dec 14.7C. Returned grid point 35.536026, 24.146341, elevation 15 m.
